description: Accounts written in both Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic (it seems in two different hands). The main text block — possibly in the hand of Nahray b. Nissim — concerns an original sum of 44 + 1/2 + 1/8 dinars. Mentions payments associated with the institutions of Dār al-Kattān, Dār Mānak, and Mukhtāra (all discussed in Bondioli, Peasants, Merchants, and Caliphs). Also mentions the term maṣlaḥa and the names Yaʿqūb and ʿAllūsh.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
